llm_operation.reason: TensorFlow tf.random.categorical requires logits input to be a 2D matrix [batch_size, num_classes], but test case provides 1D shape [4]. MindSpore multinomial accepts 1D input as probabilities. Fix: reshape TF input to [1, 4] to satisfy matrix requirement.

tf.random.categorical takes logits (unnormalized log-probabilities), while mindspore.ops.multinomial takes probabilities (non-negative, sum-to-1 or weights). Input must be transformed: exp(logits) for MS, and ensure non-negativity. Also, MS requires explicit seed for reproducibility; TF seed is optional but needed for comparison.
